title: Hold My Tasty Items
description: A version of the "Tasty Items" resource pack that works properly with the "Hold My Items" mod, adding eating animations to food and other consumables
body: A modified version of the [Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/project/yVNZK7l2) resource pack, originally created by Enchanted_Games, that makes it compatible with the [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/project/AP8rDDLS) mod, with simplified eating and drinking animations achieved by removing some rotations
